final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a muscular athlete performing a deadlift in an industrial-style gym.

Style/medium: photorealistic editorial fitness photography, gritty industrial aesthetic
Composition: medium shot from 45-degree angle, low camera position emphasizing the lift, 35mm lens, sharp focus on muscle definition
Subject: athletic male with defined muscle lines, visible sweat on skin, intense concentration, proper deadlift form with barbell
Scene/backdrop: industrial gym interior, exposed brick walls, metal beams, concrete floors, minimal equipment visible
Lighting/mood: cool-toned overhead lighting, directional spotlights creating dramatic shadows, masculine and powerful atmosphere
Color palette: cool steel blue and grey as base, warm skin tones as contrast, metallic silver from equipment
Materials/textures: glistening sweat on skin, rough concrete texture, cold metal barbell, worn leather weightlifting belt
Avoid: soft lighting, warm color casts, cluttered background, deformed hands, plastic skin texture, 8K stuffer aesthetic
